# INTENT

## User Request

Group the language bubbles into a dropdown and add a user bubble next to it. When the user is logged in, hovering should show options to go to projects or log out. When not logged in, it should show sign in.

## Requested Outcome

Refine the navbar so it feels cleaner and more app-like while preserving the existing visual language.

## Constraints

- Keep the change focused to navigation/auth UI.
- Reuse the current auth store and dashboard route.
- Verification is required.

## Open Questions

- None for this slice.
